ZENBOUT Imene

assistant professor in computer science and bioinformatics at University Ferhat Abbas Sétif 1. I earned my baccalaureate in 2011, followed by a licensed degree in computer science (2013–2014) and a master’s in software engineering (2014–2016). I completed my Ph.D. in bioinformatics in February 2020.
My research focuses on bioinformatics, AI, deep learning, generative models, and NGS, especially in cancer prediction and drug discovery.
